  Empower developers. Accelerate productivity.  
=============================================== 
Welcome to the DevPrime CLI v10.0.1	 


dp auth                Log in devprime
dp version             Show CLI and stack versions
dp new                 Create new production ready microservice
dp init                Accelerate software implementations with best practices
dp add                 Create components on application
dp state               Export and apply database schema
dp stack               Update license and devprime stack version to 10.0.1
dp export              Export configurations
dp remove              Remove properties from adapters
dp clean               Remove licence, credentials and .devprime
dp marketplace         Get items from DevPrime marketplace
dp check               Analyse domain standards

Usage:
dp <command> [options]
